RB AYOUB Solutions Inc.

Senior architecture for systems
that cannot afford improvisation.

We advise, design, and govern complex technology systems where integration, scale, security, compliance, or AI-driven behavior create architectural risk.

Based in Laval, Québec. Mandates include architecture reviews, solution design, technical documentation, cloud and platform strategy, AI systems architecture, blockchain infrastructure, and delivery governance.

Discuss a mandate View services
  • Enterprise Architecture
  • Cloud Platforms
  • AI Systems
  • Distributed Systems
  • Blockchain & Tokenization
  • Technical Governance

Architecture, advisory, and delivery support for complex systems.

01

Architecture Review

Independent assessment of system structure, integration risk, scalability, security posture, and technical debt.

02

Solution Architecture

Target architecture, service boundaries, API contracts, event-driven design, data flows, and implementation roadmaps.

03

AI Systems Architecture

LLM integration, RAG pipelines, agentic workflows, evaluation, observability, and governance patterns.

04

Cloud & Platform Architecture

Cloud-native infrastructure, Kubernetes, CI/CD, observability, security foundations, and platform operating models.

05

Blockchain & Regulated Systems

Tokenization, smart contracts, auditability, payment integration, and compliance-aware architecture.

06

Technical Governance

C4 models, ADRs, SRS/HLSD documentation, SOW support, estimates, and architecture decision frameworks.

View all services →

When the decision matters before the build begins.

  • A platform is becoming difficult to scale or maintain.
  • Multiple systems must be integrated without creating long-term coupling.
  • An AI or automation initiative needs governance before production use.
  • A technical proposal, SOW, or architecture package must be credible to executives, clients, or funders.
  • A product team needs senior architectural judgment before committing months of delivery effort.

A disciplined method.

Every engagement follows a structured approach: clarify the mandate, map the current system, identify architectural risk, define the target architecture, produce decision-grade documentation, and support implementation.

View the method →
